tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
description Host-UbuntuComputer-access
switchport mode access
switchport port-security
switchport port-security maximum 1
switchport port-security violation restrict
switchport port-security mac-address sticky
storm-control broadcast level 5.00 2.00
storm-control multicast level 5.00 2.00
storm-control action trap
end
write memory"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"show port-security interface Gi0/1\nshow storm-control interface Gi0/1\nshow running-config interface Gi0/1"}
